languages.text: Караул Смерти остался лишь легендой, и на протяжении многих лет никто из предержащих власть в Просторе Коронус не получал ни единой вести о деятельности таинственного ордена. Было ли это связано с капитаном Зораэлем, навеки затерянным среди призматических галерей Бесконечного Музеона — кто знает.

The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.
languages.original_text: Караул Смерти остался лишь легендой, и на протяжении многих лет никто из предержащих власть в Просторе Коронус не получал ни единой вести о деятельности таинственного ордена. Было ли это связано с капитаном Зораэлем, навеки затерянным среди призматических галерей Бесконечного Музеона — кто знает.

traits.locale_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious order's activities. If this was connected to Captain Victus, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious order's activities. If this was connected to Captain Victus, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious order's activities. If this was connected to Captain Victus, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

languages.text: 死の番人は伝説に過ぎず、その活動について、コーロナス・エクスパンションの権力者たちは何の噂も耳にしませんでした。もしこの死の番人が、無限の美術館のプリズムギャラリーに迷い込んだ永遠のキャプテン・ヴィクトスと関係があったならば、それは誰にもわかりません。
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious order's activities. If this was connected to Captain Victus, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

traits.locale_text: 死の番人は伝説に過ぎず、その活動について、コーロナス・エクスパンションの権力者たちは何の噂も耳にしませんでした。もしこの死の番人が、無限の美術館のプリズムギャラリーに迷い込んだ永遠のキャプテン・ヴィクトスと関係があったならば、それは誰にもわかりません。

languages.text: 死亡守望依然只是一个传说。多年来，科罗努斯扩区的当权者们再也没听到过这个神秘战团的任何风声。至于这一切是否与永远迷失在无限藏馆中的佐拉尔连长有关，无人知晓。
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

traits.locale_text: 死亡守望依然只是一个传说。多年来，科罗努斯扩区的当权者们再也没听到过这个神秘战团的任何风声。至于这一切是否与永远迷失在无限藏馆中的佐拉尔连长有关，无人知晓。

languages.text: La Deathwatch resta une simple légende. De nombreuses années durant, personne parmi les autorités des Étendues de Koronus n'eut vent du moindre murmure au sujet des activités du Chapitre mystérieux. On ignore si cette absence d'informations était liée au capitaine Zorael, à jamais perdu dans les galeries prismatiques du Muséion infini.
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

traits.locale_text: La Deathwatch resta une simple légende. De nombreuses années durant, personne parmi les autorités des Étendues de Koronus n'eut vent du moindre murmure au sujet des activités du Chapitre mystérieux. On ignore si cette absence d'informations était liée au capitaine Zorael, à jamais perdu dans les galeries prismatiques du Muséion infini.

languages.text: Los Vigías de la Muerte siguieron siendo una mera leyenda, y, durante muchos años, ninguno de los grandes poderes de la Extensión de Koronus oyeron siquiera un susurro acerca de las actividades del misterioso capítulo. Nadie podía saber si esto tenía alguna relación con el capitán Zorael, perdido por siempre en las galerías prismáticas del Museion Infinito.
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

traits.locale_text: Los Vigías de la Muerte siguieron siendo una mera leyenda, y, durante muchos años, ninguno de los grandes poderes de la Extensión de Koronus oyeron siquiera un susurro acerca de las actividades del misterioso capítulo. Nadie podía saber si esto tenía alguna relación con el capitán Zorael, perdido por siempre en las galerías prismáticas del Museion Infinito.

languages.text: Ölümnöbeti bir efsane olarak kaldı ve yıllar boyunca Koronus Enginliği'ndeki iktidar sahiplerinden hiçbiri bu gizemli Tümen'in faaliyetlerine dair en ufak bir fısıltı bile duymadı. Bunun, Mutlak Museion'un prizmatik galerilerinde sonsuza dek kaybolan Yüzbaşı Zorael ile bağlantılı olup olmadığı ise bilinmiyor.
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

traits.locale_text: Ölümnöbeti bir efsane olarak kaldı ve yıllar boyunca Koronus Enginliği'ndeki iktidar sahiplerinden hiçbiri bu gizemli Tümen'in faaliyetlerine dair en ufak bir fısıltı bile duymadı. Bunun, Mutlak Museion'un prizmatik galerilerinde sonsuza dek kaybolan Yüzbaşı Zorael ile bağlantılı olup olmadığı ise bilinmiyor.

languages.text: Die Deathwatch blieb nur eine Legende, und viele Jahre lang hörten die in der Koronus-Ausdehnung herrschenden Mächte kaum mehr als ein Flüstern von den Aktivitäten des geheimnisvollen Kapitels. Ob dies mit Captain Zorael in Verbindung stand, der für immer in den prismatischen Galerien des unendlichen Museions verschwunden war, vermag niemand zu sagen.
languages.original_text: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.

Ob dies mit Captain Zorael in Verbindung stand, der für immer in den prismatischen Galerien des unendlichen Museions verschwunden war, vermag niemand zu sagen.
